name: Pizza Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir tomato sauce, onions, and seasonings into meat until well combined.
The mixture will be thick.
2. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Place biscuits in a greased muffin tin, pressing to cover the bottom and sides of each cup.
4. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the meat mixture into each biscuit-lined cup.
5. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the top of each filled cup.
6. Bake at 400°F for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
